name: OTG Acquisition Corp. I
business: We are a newly organized blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. We have not selected any specific business combination target yet and have generated no operating revenues.

exposures.sentence: focusing on sectors whose growth is primarily driven by the expansion of data centers, digital infrastructure, power generation, communication technology and their related ecosystems, which we refer to as the Digital Infrastructure Services sector throughout this Annual Report.

We will place a particular focus on companies with ties to technology infrastructure equipment manufacturing, key inputs and support services for data center operations and the significant expansion being forecast due to adoption of generative artificial intelligence ( AI ), automation and electrification.

Connectivity is a critical enabler of digitization, automation and communication. High-bandwidth, low-latency connections with significant redundancy are necessary to develop, deploy and utilize AI applications.
creating opportunities for companies and investors in developing power projects, battery storage, microgrids, transmissions systems and power management systems.
approximately $800 billion of capital expenditure will be required for builders to meet the demand for AI-enabled data centers.
liquid-based cooling and direct chip cooling techniques have gained traction and are anticipated to experience significant growth as data center capacity grows.
management of these activities requires a host of services, including security and compliance, disaster recovery and predictive maintenance.
creating opportunities for companies and investors in developing power projects, battery storage, microgrids, transmissions systems and power management systems.

tamClaims.claim: approximately $5 trillion in investments will need to be made through the end of the decade for the construction, power generation capability, equipment and connectivity systems necessary to achieve this expanded data center capacity.
tamClaims.sentence: it is estimated that approximately $5 trillion in investments will need to be made through the end of the decade for the construction, power generation capability, equipment and connectivity systems necessary to achieve this expanded data center capacity.

tamClaims.claim: data center capacity requirements expected to triple by 2030 according to a recent McKinsey report.
tamClaims.sentence: Demand for data center capacity is rapidly growing with capacity requirements expected to triple by 2030 with approximately 70% of demand contributed to AI workloads according to a recent McKinsey report.

tamClaims.claim: unprecedented data center power demand predicted to rise to 9% of the total annual U.S. electricity load by 2030 according to the Electrical Power Research Institute.
tamClaims.sentence: unprecedented data center power demand predicted to rise to 9% of the total annual U.S. electricity load by 2030 according to the Electrical Power Research Institute.

tamClaims.claim: approximately $800 billion of capital expenditure will be required for builders to meet the demand for AI-enabled data centers.
tamClaims.sentence: approximately $800 billion of capital expenditure will be required for builders to meet the demand for AI-enabled data centers.
